entry.title: Physical inventory count
entry.content: While creating physical inventory count in MI04, I have a list of 250 line items, how do I select the check boxes all at a time? selecting it individually is consuming more time.

entry.title: Re: C4C(Sales Cloud & Service Cloud) V2.0 Readiness check for migration
entry.content:
Hi @Calin_Mitrea ,

preferably if the code - base is same for both Test/prd we should enable the report in test tenant.

entry.title: Re: I want to make only certain rows editable in table co...
entry.content: Hi, Thanks for the replies. I have found a solution for this. What worked it looping at the screen for each condition separately and modifying screen. So essentially, instead of using a single 'loop at screen' and modifying all my required columns in that, I used three different 'loop at screen' blocks and gave an if inside each of those for each of my columns.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One audit trail report
entry.content: Okie. Thanks for your updates. I will note down. But at present, we are using B1 10 (FP2105). Under this version, does it mean we need customize the audit trail report by ourselves? User need the report can show the same column in "Differences" window. But how to write the query which can list the changes compared with last log instance number for all columns in ADOC table?

entry.title: Re: cf login auth failure in CI_CD deployment

entry.title: Re: The Step-by-Step Illustration for Setting Up Composable Storefront in CCV2
entry.content:
Hi Safin,

I am from SAP - Solution Sales Configuration (SSC) team.

We are currently migrating from commerce accelerator storefront to composable storefront and need to make some customizations.

I could see the documentation related to this in your blog.

The Step-by-Step Illustration for Setting Up Composable Storefront in CCV2

Could you please suggest if this is the standard approach we follow for development and deployment of the custom Spartacus development code base to be made available to customers.

Should we package the Spartacus folder in the same package as the commerce extensions and ask customers to use the same or we need create a custom schematic for the same.

It would be great help if you can provide your inputs on the query.

I was not able to get your official mail id, so posting here.

We can be reached at umesh.bhandari@sap.com , sumit.rajan@sap.com

 

Thanks,

Umesh

entry.title: Re: Subscription Billing deployment difference
entry.content:
Hi,

You don’t need to recreate all Subscription Billing components.
Creating the Subscription Billing instance in the ‘Other Environments’ is the new approach, which was released on July 24, 2024. This way requires fewer steps and offers easier management for users while maintaining the same functionality as using Cloud Foundry.


Kind Regards,
Mina

entry.title: Re: SAP Print Service
entry.content:
Hello @Markus_Berg

I am trying to attempt an unattended printing scenario from a batch job in public cloud.

I am able to successfully create a base64 response from PDF render and add this document to the printer queue as a task. But the printing fails when the queue is connected to an actual printer. 

I tried to decode the base64 format to a hex and sent it as a document item for printing and it still fails.

How do I mitigate this issue? Am I missing something here?

Your response is much appreciated.

Thanks.

Preethi G

entry.title: Which localization to use when running B1 in Kazakhstan?
entry.content:
Hi 

  We are trying to setup B1 in Kazakhstan. Please advise which localization we should select for KZ. Shall we use Russia? Ukraine or any other localization?

  Thanks!

SAP Business One

entry.title: Re: SQLITE_CONSTRAINT: UNIQUE constraint failed error during CAP Tutorial Execution
entry.content:
Hi Matt, 

Sure, basically I just copied the same schema as copied from the same tutorial. I am pasting my schema.cds below. 

namespace my.bookshop;
using { Country, managed } from '@sap/cds/common';

entity Books {
  key ID : Integer;
  title  : localized String;
  author : Association to Authors;
  stock  : Integer;
}

entity Authors {
  key ID : Integer;
  name   : String;
  books  : Association to many Books on books.author = $self;
}

entity Orders : managed {
  key ID  : UUID;
  book    : Association to Books;
  country : Country;
  amount  : Integer;
}

entry.title: Re: Error in application when deploying it in workzone
entry.content: Yes, the components are in the backend and I need to reference them. I'm trying with resourceRoots in the manifest and that's how I have my xs-app.json. I hope it works. xs-app.json routes": [ { "source": "^/sap/(.*)$", "target": "/sap/$1", "destination": "S4H", "authenticationType": "xsuaa", "csrfProtection": false }, manifest "resourceRoots": { "sap.io.bpm.sworkfloweditor.lib.reuse": "sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/nw_aps_bpm_lib/", "sap.se.mi.plm.lib.attachmentservice": "sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/plm_ath_cres1/", "s4.cfnd.sit.reuse": "sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/sit_eng04_rc/" },

entry.title: How to implement item double click for cl_gui_alv_tree?
entry.content:
I have existing code that uses cl_gui_alv_tree class.
I have a gist of the PBO code as below: 
Just pasting a brief syntax of what I have here since there's a lot of code.

CREATE OBJECT go_custom_container
CREATE OBJECT go_alv_tree 
PERFORM build_hierarchy_header CHANGING l_hierarchy_header. 
PERFORM build_fieldcatalog.
CALL METHOD go_alv_tree->set_table_for_first_display
PERFORM create_hierarchy USING iw_h_job_chain.
CREATE OBJECT go_events. "kavin
  SET HANDLER go_events->node_double_click FOR go_alv_tree. 
  SET HANDLER go_events->item_double_click FOR go_alv_tree. 
  CALL METHOD go_alv_tree->update_calculations.
  CALL METHOD go_alv_tree->frontend_update.
  CALL METHOD cl_gui_cfw=>flush

I have defined the below methods in lcl_event_receiver (object go_events)    item_double_click FOR EVENT item_double_click OF cl_gui_alv_tree IMPORTING fieldname node_key,
node_double_click FOR EVENT node_double_click OF cl_gui_alv_tree  IMPORTING node_key.

The tree is displaying properly but the double click on item level is not working. It is not getting triggered also in fact. Don't know what I am missing here. Please help with this thanks!

Sammar

Ran

entry.title: Name of Statuses displayed by the Curricula Compliance Indicator in Required Learning section
entry.content:
Is it possible to change name/label of the statuses displayed by the Curricula compliance Indicator in the Required Learning section of the new home page? Names of status displayed are:

  • Curriculum Compliance Expired
  • Curriculum Compliance Ending
  • Curriculum Compliance Current

entry.title: Block Calendar action in Required Learning configuration requirements
entry.content: Are there additional configuration requirements for the Block Calendar action available on the Required Learning cards? As per SAP guides, users can select block time which will download an .ics file to import into their calendar. However, during our testing, a blank screen is presented when the block calendrer action is selected by the user.

entry.title: Re: company logo not comming on invoice
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

We have Find-out the exact cause of Issue.

This is missing Authorization issue one of the missing below Object and Activity.

Object - S_BDS_DS

Activity should be - (30) Determine

Business Document Service: Class name - Should be Star Value (*)

Please maintain the same in user Existing role and check after Re-login sap, Logo will be displayed in VL03N & VL02N

Thanks 
Ravi Jeet Yadav - SAP Security GRC Consultant 

Pratapgarh UP.

entry.title: Internal batch number not assigning while posting MIGO
entry.content:
we are unable to generate internal batch number assignment during MIGO transaction and number range has been setup in CBC.

Error message

Number range  not defined

Message no. 26023

Diagnosis

You have enter number range  for the document type, but this number
range is not defined for the number range object "document".

entry.title: Display order of sections in New Learning Home page
entry.content: Is it possible to move the display order of sections in the new learning homepage for example, we would like for custom cards to appear under the Required Learning section.

entry.title: Remove Action in Important Learning section of the new Learning home page
entry.content: When a learner selects the Remove action to remove learning assigned as non-required in the Important Learning section, does the admin or manager that assigned the learning get notified of the removal?

entry.title: Re: selecting a cell in sac table
entry.content:
You can in a way, as the object returned by getSelections() will contain the intersect of all dimensions at the point that was clicked. So by inspecting what was (or wasn't) returned and knowing what the drill state is of the table, you can derive the cell that was selected. But not if you mean an address like 'B7'... although you could perhaps derive this even if you really wanted to.

What is it exactly that you are trying to solve? What are you going to do with the address if you determine it?

entry.title: Consolidation breakdown categories
entry.content:
Hello,

Where can I get a list of consolidation breakdown categories and what they are used for. For instance I have codes like 1B10, 1A00, 1L10 and many more, There are around 45-50 of them. How can we find out what FS items are they used for

entry.title: SAP RAP Managed (without draft) Popup Confirmation Message with ok & cancel button
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to develop a Custom Fiori Elements List Report App (Managed without draft) based on a Custom Ztable. I want to display a Confirmation Pop up in two Scenarios (Standard Operations & Custom Actions)

1. Standard Operation (DELETE): When user clicks delete after selecting multiple items on UI, a confirmation Pop-up should be displayed with 'OK' & 'CANCEL' button.

2. Custom action (SEND):  After selecting multiple records on UI and clicking on custom button, a confirmation Pop-up should be displayed with 'OK' & 'CANCEL' button.

How can this behaviour be achieved? Is it possible only through Backend?

Also, is there a way to customize standard messages such as '1 of 2 Objects cannot be deleted....' with more explanatory message.?

ABAP Development  ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model  @patrick_winkler  @Vera_Jiang  @gregorw   @William_Yu  @junwu

entry.title: Re: Process Automation: Unattended agent is disconnected...

I have an unattended installed on a Local Desktop. Is there any way I can run the attended bot on a remote machine so that I do not have to start that particular desktop and to have the unattended but still running?

entry.title: SAP MDK - Filter List picker using the value selected in the previous list picker on the same page.
entry.content:
Hello community !

In one of my SAP MDK Projects, I have a page with 3 list pickers, Plants, Projects and Department. I am trying to filter the Department list based on the value chosen for Plant. However this dynamic filtering is not working. 

Please suggest what can be done here !

This is my page.

This is my filtering: $filter=werks eq '{{#Control:FCSetPlant/#SelectedValue}}'

entry.title: Re: Splitting Ordinary Time into three Valuations
entry.content: HI @Volker_Ruof - Using the route time evaluation types here, once the Planned time > 29 mins, we can split it between TOIL and Overtime. However, is there a (automated) way for the system to process this logic recursively with 15 minute increments? As you mentioned, we could leverage the Route Evaluation type to selectively split them up via multiple time evaluations but is there a way to kind of loop through this logic until all of the Worked time is evaluated?

entry.title: SAP future strategy around Scope Items BH1, BH2 & BJ2 in Private Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

9 Phase Model Vs Traditional Maintenance methods [ 4HH, 4HI Vs BH1, BH2 & BJ2]

I found, for SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Asset management scope Items BH1, BH2 & BJ2 scope items are excluded from default activation (that means they are Deprecated) Whereas in SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition all scope items are available (for activation).

Question here - if client is going with Private cloud edition, can they still use processes around scope items BH1, BH2 & BJ2 as they will remain activated and not deprecated in near future? (May be for next 3-4 years’ time span)

As I understand scope items BH1,BH2,BJ2 are deprecated from 2302 release in public cloud and replaced with 4HH and 4HI, But still in case client requirements to not to go ahead with 9 Phase model in private cloud edition, Is it still valid proposition to suggest these scope items?

I couldn’t find clear answer on this in SAP road map explorer or anywhere else hence reaching out to wider group of experts here.

Any comments or suggestions are highly appreciated in terms of guiding client(s) into right direction during process adaptation, Considering SAP future strategy around Scope Items BH1, BH2 & BJ2.

BR,

Riyaj

entry.title: Re: Minimum Pay/Wage concept in SuccessFactors Time Tracking
entry.content:

A follow-up question on using the same function but for recursively evaluating Working time in a specific manner. Could you provide some pointers please?

Thanks,

Naveen

passing these inputes to the fm and when I am trying to execute getting the below one

 

Pls help anyone to resolve this.

entry.title: Re: Allocate products to Distribution channels by percentage not Quantity
entry.content:
Hi,

the Product Allocation works with quantities and not with percentages. In case you want would like to work with percentages, you would need to calculate the number and put this number into the time bucket of the planning data. There are basically two ways to achieve this:

  1. API to update the PAL planning data
  2. Excel up/download

The background why percentage is not supported is the following: When taking your example, it is straight forward to apply the percentage on top of the 1000pc and come to 500pc etc. Furthermore, when increasing the quantity from 1000pc to 2000pc, it would also make not such an issue, since 50% would increase the number to 1000pc. The trouble starts when for example reducing the overall quantity. In such a case you would start with 1000pc and let us say your Distribution Channel 3 has already a confirmation over 150pc (translating to 15%). You reduce your 1000pc to 700pc since 200pc had for instance to be scrapped. According to your percentage vice planning you would need to completely check all requirements again and correct the confirmations as 20% is no longer 200pc but 140pc. Hence, a over confirmation in the respective time bucket of Distribution Channel 3 exists. 

Additionally you run into situation where the percentage lead to fractions that cannot be confirmed. Think of an example where you want 14% of 457pc. This is 63,98pc.   

Regards,
Andreas

entry.title: Re: Unable to Update manually added Standard Fields to St...
entry.content:
Hello @Sijin_Chandran ,

how do you know which correct CDS needs to be extended regarding adding standard fields in API_Purchase_Order, which in this case you enhance the 'E_PurchasingDocumentItem'.

entry.content:
We use SAP Business One 10.0.

How can I specify the display order of the user-defined fields for all users in a form?

entry.title: Re: How to search within this managed tag (SAP SQL Anywhere)?
entry.content:
According to that general question, basically you don't search within the SAP sites. I can't believe SAP cannot do better.

https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/how-to-seach-in-sap-community/qaq-p/13662086

entry.title: Re: Two colons in PATH
entry.content:
Hi Mark

You were right (by chance it looks) about SP03 PL07. That indeed happened to be the release where the WLA environment variable was introduced and it has been wrong from the start.

The KBA has been updated with following:

A fix for the issue from CR 829765 will be released in:

ASE 16.0 SP04 PL07
ASE 16.1

Workaround:
Manually modify the environment file and remove the extra character.

As there will be no further PLs for SP03, for this release the workaround needs to be applied.

Rgds

Bart

setting we need to update at our end for “Carbon Copy document transfer”.

This is for Ariba solution

Dear CodeJam Experts,

Vincent Weiss

entry.title: Re: CDS --profile hybrid

entry.title: RAP Managed Action RESULT is not updating the Response
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working on a RAP Managed scenario with Unmanaged save. I have 2 actions as following,

  1. Test: Update few fields of the entityset and return the updated fields.
  2. Post: Execute BGMC Operation.

I have checked the post https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/rap-action-does-not-update-the-instance/qaq-p/12531084 however the issue remains.

My action is,

 

action test result [1..*] $self;

 

My bdef mapping is,

 

create;
update;
action test result [1..*] $self;
action post;
mapping for zasset
{
message = message;
}

 

My action implementation is

 

METHOD test for MODIFY
IMPORTING keys FOR ACTION Asset~test RESULT result.

METHOD test .
MODIFY ENTITIES OF zasset IN LOCAL MODE
ENTITY Asset
UPDATE FIELDS ( message )
WITH VALUE #( FOR <fs> IN keys ( %tky = <fs>-%tky message = 'Test' ) )
FAILED DATA(lt_failed) REPORTED DATA(lt_reported) .

READ ENTITIES OF zasset IN LOCAL MODE
ENTITY Asset ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys ) RESULT DATA(lt_result) .

result = VALUE #( FOR <fs> IN lt_result ( %tky = <fs>-%tky %param = <fs> ) ) .
ENDMETHOD .

 

The requirement is to fill the message field with some messages after validating the keys whenever user clicks on the action TEST, like a simulation. The POST action is responsible for COMMIT to the database.

The result structure is having the updated value for the message field, however the response is not being updated either in browser or postman.

@Andre_Fischer, could you please help me here.

2. In any container, there are predefined properties such as Title, Subhead, StatusText, etc. However, I have to add more items to the card and can't add them there. For Tittle, there is no line break or extra space that I can add.

I appreciate your help on the issues mentioned above.

Madhav

entry.title: How to cancel invoice schedule open dates in a sales order
entry.content:
There is a sales order contains invoice schedules. After created some invoices, you want to cancel the remaining invoice schedule dates as no more invoices are required.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to cancel invoice schedule open dates in a sales...
entry.content:
To manually cancel the open invoice schedule dates, the user can use the action - cancel open dates option.

  1. Edit the sales order.
  2. Go to Pricing and Invoicing -> Invoice Schedule tab.
  3. Expand the schedule for the line, you will see there is an invoice date scheduled in the future with Open status. You do not want to create invoice request for the date and need to cancel the date.
  4. Select the line row, click Actions button and select Cancel Open Dates. The date will be with Cancelled status.

entry.title: Maximum call stack size exceeded in sac table
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

While trying to use a formula in the formula bar for an added row of sac table, it shwos an error "Maximum call stack size exceeded". How can we resolve this?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Asset Manager - Requested object &ESRT_IDP_ID& is currently locked by user
entry.content: I resolved the issue. Check Idempotent Services and make sure it was scheduled and executed.

entry.title: Re: Catalog Object Grant ACCESS Issue in HANA DB
entry.content:
Hi,

I think that by resetting the user and logging in with it, you can transfer the property to another user.

Another option is to recover the code of the procedure and generate a new one in a different space, and update the objects that used it.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Intrastat reporting with mother company outside EU

May I know if you have any documentation or configuration guide on how a non-EU company code intrastart customizing is different that an EU one?

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields and Logics - Create and Capturing the Changes into Transport Request
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm still waiting for your response for above my previous comment.

entry.title: Re: I want to make only certain rows editable in table co...
entry.content:
Basics to make the Table Control cells with input enabled or disabled varying according to each line. Adapt to your needs.

Flow logic:

PROCESS BEFORE OUTPUT.
  LOOP AT itab INTO line WITH CONTROL yourcontrol.
    MODULE pbo_one_line.
  ENDLOOP.

ABAP code:

MODULE pbo_one_line OUTPUT.
  LOOP AT SCREEN INTO DATA(screen_field).
    CASE screen_field-name.
      WHEN 'COL3'. 
        IF line-col7 = 'TRUE'. 
          screen_field-input = '0'. "input disabled. 
        ELSE. 
          screen_field-input = '1'. "input enabled. 
        ENDIF. 
    ENDCASE. 
    MODIFY SCREEN.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDMODULE.

entry.title: Re: Payment Terms and Baseline Dates
entry.content: First of all , I would like to thank all for their fruitful feedbacks, in the meantime changing the baseline date to be equal to posting date will never give accurate payment term because the payment terms is usually determined either in agreement or included in the invoice (document date ) and as soon as the system should calculate the payment terms from document date so that, the baseline date shall be configured equal to document date and accordingly the payment term must be calculated from baseline date

entry.title: Re: Question regarding Dynamic time navigation functions in SAC
entry.content: Could anyone answer this?. I was hoping to create YTD, QTD, MTD reports in table or charts using the dynamic navigation functions and if the calculated measures display data only at the default hierarchy, then what is the purpose of these functions, what are the use cases for which these functions are suitable? I was expecting the calculated measures to aggregate (roll up or down) to the levels selected in the widget.

entry.title: Re: Catalog Object Grant ACCESS Issue in HANA DB
entry.content: Hi Xavi , Thank you for the response. I have suggested the same with the Security team, they were saying its against the policy. Regarding the other option , that procedure is used in multiple interfaces & requires changes at multiple places. Just for my understanding there is no other options right ? only object owner can assign access to other right ?

entry.title: Call for Speakers: SAP Inside Track Pune 2024
entry.content:
We are excited to announce the speaker registration for SAP Inside Track Pune 2024, happening on October 19th, 2024! Our focus is on the transformative power of SAP Business AI, and we are looking for passionate speakers to share their expertise and insights across various tracks. If you have experience in building AI applications, creating innovative Business AI solutions, or working with Embedded AI in SAP products, we invite you to contribute to our event.
 
Event Details:
Date: October 19th, 2024
Time: 9 AM - 5 PM IST
Venue: SAP Labs India, ITPP, Pune
 
Find more about the event in the announcement blog post: SAP Inside Track Pune 2024 - Announcement 
 
Speaker Tracks for your proposal:
Track 1: Building AI Applications on SAP BTP
Dive into the technicalities of building AI-powered applications on SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). Demonstrate how developers and architects can leverage SAP BTP to create robust AI solutions that drive business value.

Track 2: Business AI Solutions from Ecosystem - Partners & Customers
Showcase successful AI solutions developed by SAP partners and customers. Share case studies, implementation experiences, and collaborative projects that highlight the innovative use of Business AI within the SAP ecosystem.

Track 3: Embedded AI across Solutions - SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors & Other SAP Products
Explore the integration of Embedded AI in various SAP products like SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, CX, and more. Discuss how these intelligent features are transforming business processes and enhancing user experiences.
 
Why Speak at SAP Inside Track Pune 2024?
  • Showcase Your Expertise: Share your knowledge with a passionate and engaged audience of SAP professionals.
  • Network with Peers: Connect with fellow experts, partners, and SAP enthusiasts.
  • Gain Recognition: Enhance your professional profile and gain recognition within the SAP community
How to Register:
Ready to share your insights at SAP Inside Track Pune 2024? Register now to become a speaker and contribute to one of the most exciting SAP community events of the year.

Speaker Registration Link: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScrOZES6KJUk279dl06X4hzaQQMRuLeHkTGrX7wloUnXXpCcQ/viewform
 
Next Steps: Once you submit your proposal,
Step 1: Our expert team will go through your proposal and if it is shortlisted, we will contact your for more details.
Step 2: This will again be discussed internally with the experts and once shortlisted, we will inform you about the next steps – like presentation format, social media advertisement etc.,
We look forward to your valuable contributions and to seeing you at SAP Inside Track Pune 2024!
 
 
Best Regards,
SAP Community Pune Core Team

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI Production Order Creation Fails Due to Invali...
entry.content: Hi, I get this error too but when I use a future date, entering today's date causes no problems as well as entering a date from the past (the system changes it to today's date)

entry.title: Print preview function is greyed out in Change Journal Entries app screen on Public Cloud system
entry.content:
Hello!

I have a question regarding the functionality of "print preview" in Change Journal Entries app. 

We would like to export the journal entries from this screen but it seems like the function is not enabled on this app.

The steps taken to reach this screen is as below

"Manage Journal Entries" app > Select a journal entry and click on a link to jump to "Change Journal Entries" > Click on "Document" and find the greyed out "Print Preview" section.

Is there a way to enable it or a workaround to export the journal entry information?

Best Regards,

Fujita

entry.title: Re: Time Tracking (Timesheet): Time off in-Lieu accumulation in DAYS with expiry date
entry.content: I am looking for a similar solution to the same request, what I need is that the overtime will be accumulated and once its 8 hours then it will be converted to a 1 day.

entry.title: Re: Problems while adding object to Transport request via FM TR_REQUEST_CHOICE.
entry.content:
No issue for me. Just filling:

IV_SUPPRESS_DIALOG = 'X'
IV_REQUEST = <my own workbench modifiable transport request>
IT_E071 = only R3TR FORM <my sapscript form> (no transport request)

Note that the object is added in the object list of the transport request, not the task.

entry.title: Re: Catalog Object Grant ACCESS Issue in HANA DB
entry.content: Yes, by default the owner is the user that creates the object, and ONLY if this user give permission to others, they can change the object. And I agree that it is not good policy to reset users, but neither is it good policy to have a user with a password that ONLY a ex-employee knows :-).

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - Filter List picker using the value selected...
entry.content:
This is a case of cascading list picker where you want to display value in a picker based on the selection from previous picker.

You will set a rule to the OnValueChange event of the Plant List picker. Based on the selected value from the Plant List picker, this rule will set the query option and update the Target Specifier of the Department List Picker.

See this example:

 

 

export default function PlantTypeChange(context) {
    let pageProxy = context.getPageProxy();
    let plantPicker = pageProxy.getControl('SectionedTable0').getSection('SectionFormCell0').getControl('PlantLP');
    let plantTypeValue = plantPicker.getValue()[0].ReturnValue;
    let DepartmentPicker = pageProxy.getControl('SectionedTable0').getSection('SectionFormCell0').getControl('DepartmentLP');
    let specifier = DepartmentPicker.getTargetSpecifier();
    let qo = `$filter=werks eq '${plantTypeValue}'`;
    specifier.setQueryOptions(qo);
    DepartmentPicker.setTargetSpecifier(specifier);
}

 

You may additionally set the Department Picker to disable until a Plant is selected.

are there any constraint issues here?

entry.title: END TO END INSTALLATION OF SAP EHP8 ERP SYSTEM WITH ORACLE DATABASE 19c ON RHEL 8.8
entry.content:
# ATR(24)

Hello Basis folks, Sharing my article.

END TO END INSTALLATION OF SAP EHP8 ERP SYSTEM WITH ORACLE DATABASE 19c ON RHEL 8.8

[ 3 in 1 COMBO - 7 CHECK POINTS]
INSTALLATION OF EHP8 SAP SYSTEM
INSTALLATION OF ORACLE DB 19c
ORACLE DB PATCH UPDATE 19.24

CHECK POINTS:
1) PREREQUISITE CHECK FOR INSTALLATION
2) STACK XML FILE GENERATION IN MAINTENANCE PLANNER
3) SWPM OPERATION [START] – INSTALLATION OF BASE PACK
4) ORACLE DATABASE INSTALLATION (IN MID OF SWPM)
5) ORACLE PATCH UPDATE WITH POST INSTALLATION SCRIPT (IN MID OF SWPM)
6) COMPLETION OF SWPM – INSTALLATION OF BASE PACK
7) SUM EXECUTION – EHP UPDATE WITH SAP NW


Post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/ajaytr66_atr-activity-7239972999372660736-m8Wp?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop 

Article Link: https://drive.google.com/file/d/18Mxwf7J8OcYdY-KS8A6i0l3cOdm8wEIZ/view?usp=sharing 
PASS: ATR
😊

entry.title: Automatically populate Person Responsible in IW32/33 screen
entry.content:
I want to auto populate person responsible field in IW33. The service order of certain order type and PM activity type is created through a custom transaction (using BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN).

I tried using pers_no in wtbl_oper table for the BAPI in the custom program but that did not reflect in IW33 screen. So I am thinking of using enhancements for order creation at save which will let me update the pernr field in afvgd structure for the ordertype-activitytype combination

Any other suggestions are welcome as well. Thanks!

entry.title: Use selected value from 1st FormCellListPicker as filter expression in 2nd FormCellListPicker
entry.content:
Hi

Please guide me to use selected value from 1st FormCellListPicker as filter expression in 2nd FormCellListPicker on a single page.

Example:  For a selected State, only Districts corresponding to that State should be visible. Similarly for a selected district only Taluka corresponding to that district should be shown.

Regards,

Girish

entry.title: Re: Document Information Extraction, Error message during...
entry.content:
by default , client is created , so first delete this default cliend_Id , and You can try to create new one ,

Step 1:-  check get/clients (to get all clients)
Step 2:-  if there is client it will show , other wise in json ,payload will be empty array.
Step 3:- if there is already client delete it , and you can create your client

entry.title: Re: How to see long text of the error message for stuck q...
entry.content:
Hello @ChetanPatil1 

Double click on the error text in the "StatusText" field should bring you either the long text of the message or the error log. At least it works like that in my S/4HANA installation.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: double consumption
entry.content:
Hi  mhmdt1

Do you get double consumption on desktop also? if you dont get it double consumption in desktop, then there is a problem in handheld program so you need to debug and find the issue(if it is z program)  If it is happening in both desktop as well as handheld device then there is a problem in both program. As you mentioned fiori app so it seems it is a standard app. in this case you need to take help from SAP support team. it may be a bug in apps 

Also if it is a standard fiori apps you can see fiori library and see the enhancement packs

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: Problems while adding object to Transport request via FM TR_REQUEST_CHOICE.
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

Thank you, it is adding now in the object list of TR by adding these parameters.
IV_SUPPRESS_DIALOG = 'X'
IV_REQUEST = <my own workbench modifiable transport request>
IT_E071 = only R3TR FORM <my sapscript form> (no transport request)

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Public Cloud - EWM How to start an ABAP repo...
entry.content: Hi, the linked solution in my understanding "only" covers "MM"-stock (ERP-only). The procedure for an SAP EWM warehouse is traditionally to upload the stock to the EWM system which than synchronizes the stock with the "ERP" System. So your proposed solution does not fit to the described problem.
